Interface IRasterInfo

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.DatasourcesRaster
Assembly
ESRI.Server.DatasourcesRaster.dll

Provides access to members that control a raster info object.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("94058B85-ACF1-49BA-A2A7-A9CCC6F4C26A")]
public interface IRasterInfo

Properties

BandCount

The number of bands in the Raster.

int BandCount { get; set; }

Property Value

int

The block height in pixels.

int BlockHeight { get; set; }

int

The block width in pixels.

int FirstPyramidLevel { get; set; }

int

The raster format, e.g. TIFF, NITF, and etc.

string Format { get; set; }

string

int

object NoData { get; set; }

rstPixelType PixelType { get; set; }
